response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and real-time systems, but lacks explicit experience in agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI deployment. His leadership roles (e.g., Staff Engineer) are promising, but scaling teams to 30+ and governing hybrid engineering models is not clearly evidenced. His fintech experience is limited to direct mail automation, not core financial systems.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Hands-on experience with real-time systems, low-latency apps, and high-performance databases
Proven track record in scaling engineering practices (CI/CD, TDD, trunk-based development) and leading technical initiatives
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance) beyond direct mail automation
No clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or governing hybrid engineering models with external partners
